name: Pickled Herring-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the herring by leaving the skins on and cutting into 1 inch pieces.
2. Combine all ingredients except the herring in a large pot.
3. Bring to a boil for 15 minutes.
4. Add the prepared herring to the mixture and let simmer for an additional 15 minutes.
5. Allow the mixture to cool, then transfer to a jar or container.
6. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
